notes: v1.14.112 - Phase 0 dead-code removal (PARITY_AUDIT.md). Cut 2 verified def-only orphans: identity_isLead (build-lead boolean, 0 callers) and deploy_flushState (debounce no-op, 0 callers) plus its now-orphaned _deployFlushTimer var. NOTE: the audit's 3rd proposed orphan, hwMatrix_init, was NOT cut - it is a self-invoked IIFE (builds PHANTOM_HW_MATRIX._flat consumed by the HW Ref tab) and is LIVE boot code; cutting it would break the HW Ref matrix (same IIFE trap the audit correctly caught for _session_bootRestore). No behavior change; all 3 inline scripts parse clean. Legacy + redesign byte-identical at runtime.
